name: goalfydata
description: Turn your agent's data output into living, shareable assets — GoalfyData hosts the datasets and dashboards your agents build, and handles refresh, permissions, and sharing for your whole team.

plugins.name: goalfydata
plugins.description: Build, query, and share datasets and deploy public dashboards from Claude Code via MCP — with managed refresh, fine-grained permissions, and one-link sharing, so results outlive the conversation.
